name: Dried Fruit Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Add the dried fruit as you would for raisin bread.
2. If desired, marinate the fruit in rum (or any liquor) before adding it to the mixture. This can add a nice holiday flavor to the bread.
3. Mix all ingredients together until well combined.
4. Pour the batter into a greased loaf pan and bake at 350°F for 30-40 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
5. Allow the bread to cool in the pan for 10 minutes before removing it and slicing.
